## Meeting Purpose

[Discuss progress on generating blog content using AI for SEO purposes and gather feedback to improve the process.](https://fathom.video/share/ZsGYcEHqptEmtdxjDBbzxGsf4LgZ16XW?tab=summary&timestamp=0.0)

## Key Takeaways

  - [The team has published 7 AI-generated blog posts so far and aims to publish 10 this week](https://fathom.video/share/ZsGYcEHqptEmtdxjDBbzxGsf4LgZ16XW?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Feedback was provided on improving the posts by adding images, stats, and making them more visually appealing](https://fathom.video/share/ZsGYcEHqptEmtdxjDBbzxGsf4LgZ16XW?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [Early positive signals are being seen in terms of rankings and traffic](https://fathom.video/share/ZsGYcEHqptEmtdxjDBbzxGsf4LgZ16XW?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [Plans to enrich the posts by adding relevant stats, quotes, infographics in a second optimization phase](https://fathom.video/share/ZsGYcEHqptEmtdxjDBbzxGsf4LgZ16XW?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [Discussions on using different content formats like listicles, optimizing for semantics beyond just Google](https://fathom.video/share/ZsGYcEHqptEmtdxjDBbzxGsf4LgZ16XW?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)

## Topics

### Initial Blog Post Results

  - [7 AI-generated blog posts published so far, aiming for 10 this week](https://fathom.video/share/ZsGYcEHqptEmtdxjDBbzxGsf4LgZ16XW?tab=summary&timestamp=9.0)
  - [Some early positive signals in rankings and traffic](https://fathom.video/share/ZsGYcEHqptEmtdxjDBbzxGsf4LgZ16XW?tab=summary&timestamp=331.0)
  - [Need to visually enhance posts by adding images, stats, quotes](https://fathom.video/share/ZsGYcEHqptEmtdxjDBbzxGsf4LgZ16XW?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)

### Enriching Blog Posts

  - [Plan to enrich published posts in a second phase](https://fathom.video/share/ZsGYcEHqptEmtdxjDBbzxGsf4LgZ16XW?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [Add relevant stats, quotes, infographics using AI and human curation](https://fathom.video/share/ZsGYcEHqptEmtdxjDBbzxGsf4LgZ16XW?tab=summary&timestamp=488.0)
  - [Explore different content formats like listicles for better engagement](https://fathom.video/share/ZsGYcEHqptEmtdxjDBbzxGsf4LgZ16XW?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)
  - [Optimize for semantic search beyond just Google rankings](https://fathom.video/share/ZsGYcEHqptEmtdxjDBbzxGsf4LgZ16XW?tab=summary&timestamp=819.0)

### Improving Visual Appeal

  - [Current posts look too automated without images](https://fathom.video/share/ZsGYcEHqptEmtdxjDBbzxGsf4LgZ16XW?tab=summary&timestamp=90.0)
  - [Explore AI image generation tools like Midjourney](https://fathom.video/share/ZsGYcEHqptEmtdxjDBbzxGsf4LgZ16XW?tab=summary&timestamp=239.0)
  - [Or use stock images/graphics from human designers](https://fathom.video/share/ZsGYcEHqptEmtdxjDBbzxGsf4LgZ16XW?tab=summary&timestamp=161.0)
  - [Have AI recommend infographic concepts tied to each post](https://fathom.video/share/ZsGYcEHqptEmtdxjDBbzxGsf4LgZ16XW?tab=summary&timestamp=462.0)

### Optimizing for Search Intent

  - [Using AI to determine true search intent behind queries](https://fathom.video/share/ZsGYcEHqptEmtdxjDBbzxGsf4LgZ16XW?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Helps with semantic optimization beyond just keywords](https://fathom.video/share/ZsGYcEHqptEmtdxjDBbzxGsf4LgZ16XW?tab=summary&timestamp=370.0)
  - [Exploring tactics like smart interlinking, footer links to boost rankings](https://fathom.video/share/ZsGYcEHqptEmtdxjDBbzxGsf4LgZ16XW?tab=summary&timestamp=1472.0)

## Next Steps

  - Share early ranking/traffic stats in a follow-up report
  - Connect with product team for deeper insights on target audience
  - Refine content generation workflows for listicles, infographics
  - Implement visual enhancements and enrichment plan for published posts
